title: helianthemum thymifolium var. strictum
intro: Helianthemum thymifolium var. strictum, also known as rockrose or strict rockrose, is a plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family, characterized by its compact growth habit and pinkish-white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Helianthemum thymifolium var. strictum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or salves, allowing for various applications, such as wound healing, skin care, and immune system support.
